excluded_for_leakage_reason: All scorecard/player performance columns, toss_winner, team1_bat_first, match_result, match_outcome_type, and match_winner as feature
cleaning_notes: West is standardised to West Indies
broken scraped venue menu text is replaced with Unknown
only resolved matches where winner equals team1 or team2 are kept
anti_leakage_notes: Bayesian historical features are written before updating with the current match result
No current-match scorecard field is used
Later test matches may use earlier test-period results because those results would be known before the later match date in a chronological pre-match simulation
